notes: Full French dinner menu captured (hors d'oeuvre, les plats, desserts). Several two-price items (oysters half/dozen; rack of lamb half/full; steak frites hanger/filet) — smaller in price_cents, full note in price_note. Wine + cocktail lists are on separate /wines and /lounge pages, not captured. Elliott Bay views at Pike Place Market.

dishes.name: Soupe à l'Oignon
dishes.description: French onion soup.

dishes.name: Plateau de Fruits de Mer (for two)
dishes.description: Chilled seafood platter: half dozen local oysters, six shrimps, two snow crab legs, whelks and mussels.

dishes.name: Les Huitres Fraiche
dishes.description: Fresh oysters on the half shell with champagne mignonette.

dishes.name: Escargots à la Bourguignonne
dishes.description: Baked escargot in a garlic and parsley butter.

dishes.name: Foie Gras Frais
dishes.description: Seared Hudson Valley foie gras, apricot-pear chutney, balsamic reduction, on butter brioche.

dishes.name: Planche de Fromages et Charcuteries
dishes.description: Assortment of charcuteries and cheeses, pickled accouterments and half baguette.

dishes.name: Camembert au Four
dishes.description: Baked camembert cheese, honey, walnuts, crostinis.

dishes.name: Caviar d'Esturgeon
dishes.description: Osetra sturgeon caviar on ice, blinis and crème fraîche.

dishes.name: Salade Verte au Roquefort
dishes.description: Field greens with Roquefort and Dijon vinaigrette.

dishes.name: Soupe du Jour
dishes.description: Soup of the day.

dishes.name: Belgium Frites
dishes.description: Fries "cornet" with dipping sauce.

dishes.name: French Baguette
dishes.description: Served with sea salt butter from Brittany.

dishes.name: Confit De Canard
dishes.description: Hudson Valley duck leg confit, french green lentils, bacon & skillet potatoes.

dishes.name: Carré d'Agneau Roti
dishes.description: Herb and Dijon-crusted rack of lamb with roasted baby carrots, green beans, mushrooms, mashed potatoes and roasted garlic rosemary demi-glace.

dishes.name: Coquilles St. Jacques
dishes.description: Seared sea scallops, brown butter, butternut squash puree, green beans and mushrooms.

dishes.name: Steak Frites au Poivre
dishes.description: Choice of hanger or filet mignon steak, black pepper cream sauce, hand cut fries and tomato provençale. Add seared foie gras +22.

dishes.name: Salade Niçoise with Tuna
dishes.description: Grilled ahi tuna, baby greens, olives, green beans, red bell peppers, hard boiled egg, heirloom tomatoes, Dijon vinaigrette.

dishes.name: Iberico Côte de Porc
dishes.description: Seared Iberico pork tomahawk, mashed potatoes, Brussels sprouts and bacon, caramelized apples and Calvados sauce.

dishes.name: Perche Asiatique À La Ciboulette
dishes.description: Pan seared Barramundi (Australian seabass), roasted zucchini & yellow squash, cherry tomatoes, mushrooms, chives beurre blanc.

dishes.name: Les Moules Marinière
dishes.description: Mussels steamed with butter, wine, shallots, garlic, & parsley.

dishes.name: Gâteau au Chocolat
dishes.description: Flourless chocolate cake (almonds, coconut, raisins), coconut sweetened crème fraîche.

dishes.name: Crème Brûlée
dishes.description: Vanilla flavored custard topped with caramelized brown sugar.

dishes.name: Profiteroles au Chocolat
dishes.description: Olympic Mountain vanilla ice cream-filled cream puffs, topped with chocolate sauce and sliced almonds.

dishes.name: Gateau Basque au Fromage
dishes.description: Basque style burnt cheesecake.
